title: ATOM-186 Time limit 10 minutes! Only for amateurs! Voice patience game
overview: Never speak out no matter what you do! If you don't speak out for 10 minutes to lewd mischief such as electric massage from soft tickling, the prize money is 1 million yen! However, amateur girls who fail one after another challenge "voice and patience sex" for 1 million yen! No matter how much you put up with it, if you insert Ji Po, you will fail immediately! Forget about the game and feel it!
